_notes.statusline_style: braille | circles | plain. Glyph ramp shown before each percentage.
_notes.statusline_color: ANSI color zones: yellow within 10 points of a window's threshold, red+bold past it.
_notes.hibernate_enabled: Opt-in. When a usage-limit stop is detected AND the quota cache confirms a window is near cap, a watchdog waits out the reset and resumes the session (tmux send-keys into the original pane, else `claude --resume`). It types into your terminal — leave false unless you want that.
_notes.hibernate_settle_seconds: Extra seconds past the window reset before resuming.
_notes.hibernate_max_wait_hours: Never wait longer than this; stale hibernation markers are abandoned.
_notes.fable_available_on_plan: Set true ONLY if a promo/frontier model (e.g. Fable) actually appears in Claude Code's model selector for this account. Entitlement flag only; live headroom is still gated automatically.
_notes.test_override: For routing-matrix tests. Shape: {"expires_epoch": <unix secs, <=15min out>, "claude": {"five_hour": {"used": N, "minutes_to_reset": M}, "seven_day": {"used": N, "minutes_to_reset": M}}, "codex": {"long": {"used": N, "minutes_to_reset": M}, "short": null}}. Skill ignores expired overrides and labels active ones as TEST decisions.
_notes.previous_statusline: Full prior statusLine object if one existed when this was installed, so it can be wrapped and restored. null if none. install.sh fills this in automatically.
